[tests/test_apply_post_package.py](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/tests/test_apply_post_package.py) High-priority residual tasks after defaulting to textless thumbnails: 1. Align quote-tweet exception across runtime paths. - `approval_guard.py` exempts quote posts from thumbnail blocking, but `scheduler.py` and `prepare_post_bundle.py` still treat quote posts as requiring image. - `tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py` locks in current mismatch by asserting quote requires image. 2. Centralize thumbnail-exemption and minimum-size logic. - Move exception + size threshold checks into one shared policy helper and use it consistently in `scheduler.py`, `prepare_post_bundle.py`, `queue_audit.py`, and approval checks. 3. Implement/define Gate-2 enforcement. - `thumbnail_gate2_pass` is persisted in Notion (via [schema.py], [notion_sync.py], [scripts/apply_post_package.py]) but no active runtime gate blocks posting when Gate-2 is false; only manual QA appears represented. 4. Backfill consistency for legacy/partial image sync. - `scripts/backfill_notion_images.py` uploads and sets `Image` but does not populate thumbnail QA fields (`Thumbnail QA Verified`, `Thumbnail Image Present`, `Thumbnail Bytes`, `Thumbnail Gate2 Pass`), creating potential gate ambiguity. 5. Reconcile thresholds in docs/code/test. - Current constants differ (`95KB`, `100KB`, `200KB`) between runtime and docs; pick one canonical threshold policy and reflect it in: - `scripts/prepare_post_bundle.py` - `scheduler.py` - `CLAUDE.md` - related tests 6. Match generation behavior to documented KAWAI-style/category mappings. - Textless default is in place, but prompt/...
